'''zhayata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecity|cecity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecity|cecity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhayata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyætæth|zhæyætæth]] || [[word:zhæyætæj|zhæyætæj]] || [[word:zhæyætæsh|zhæyætæsh]] || [[word:zhæyætæ|zhæyætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayayatath|zhayayatath]] || [[word:zhayayataj|zhayayataj]] || [[word:zhayayatash|zhayayatash]] || [[word:zhayayata|zhayayata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayatath|zhayatath]] || [[word:zhayataj|zhayataj]] || [[word:zhayatash|zhayatash]] || [[word:zhayata|zhayata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayaftath|zhayaftath]] || [[word:zhayaftaj|zhayaftaj]] || [[word:zhayaftash|zhayaftash]] || [[word:zhayaftaf|zhayaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayatatha|zhayatatha]] || [[word:zhayataja|zhayataja]] || [[word:zhayatasha|zhayatasha]] || [[word:zhayataka|zhayataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayatath|zhayatath]] || [[word:zhayataj|zhayataj]] || [[word:zhayatash|zhayatash]] || [[word:zhayata|zhayata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayatathal|zhayatathal]] || [[word:zhayatajal|zhayatajal]] || [[word:zhayatashal|zhayatashal]] || [[word:zhayatakal|zhayatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayatathatha|zhayatathatha]] || [[word:zhayatajaja|zhayatajaja]] || [[word:zhayatashasha|zhayatashasha]] || [[word:zhayataka|zhayataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayatathan|zhayatathan]] || [[word:zhayatajan|zhayatajan]] || [[word:zhayatashan|zhayatashan]] || [[word:zhayatakan|zhayatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayatathaoro|zhayatathaoro]] || [[word:zhayatajaoro|zhayatajaoro]] || [[word:zhayatashaoro|zhayatashaoro]] || [[word:zhayatakaoro|zhayatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
